# Julia Persson

> Founder & CEO of Scita Health (Danish precision health company building AI-powered clinical decision support for women navigating perimenopause and menopause). Founding Architect of the Nordic Charter for Women's Health 2040, published in The Lancet (January 2026). Participant in the WHO/Europe Public Health Innovation Platform.

Julia Persson is a Copenhagen-based digital health founder and policy architect focused on closing the women's health gap in midlife. She brings 20+ years of digital transformation experience across regulated sectors (finance, healthcare) and now applies that to precision prevention for women.

## About

- [Main bio](https://juliapersson.com/): Founder profile, current ventures, track record, and connect links.
- [Press kit](https://juliapersson.com/press/): Speaker topics, short and long bios, headshots, organisation logos, PDF one-pager, Lancet citation, and press contacts.

## Current ventures

- [Scita Health](https://scita.health): AI-powered clinical decision support tools helping women prevent chronic disease through a personalised, bio-adaptive approach. Focus on perimenopause and menopause. Soft launch August 2026, pilot (N=50) October 2026. Participating organisation in the WHO/Europe Public Health Innovation Platform.
- [Nordic Charter for Women's Health 2040](https://womenshealth2040.org): Pan-Nordic coordination framework — open commons, not organisation. 136 contributors across 5 countries. Methodology published in The Lancet Obstetrics, Gynaecology, & Women's Health (January 2026). Implementation Playbook published 28 May 2026 at BLOX, Copenhagen, with the Copenhagen Institute for Futures Studies.

## Advisory roles

- Women's Health Horizons — EU Strategic Advisory Board (women's health policy, healthcare, investment).
- myHealth@myHands — EU Digital Europe Programme advisory (citizen-controlled health data via EUDI Wallet).
- 123cards — Board Director (intergenerational communication).

## Publications

- Persson J, Gemzell-Danielsson K, Krivonos D. The Nordic Charter for Women's Health 2040: Vision-Led Architecture for Women's Health. Lancet Obstet Gynecol Womens Health. 2026. https://doi.org/10.1016/S3050-5038(26)00014-2

## Contact

- Press / Scita Health: julia@scita.health
- Nordic Charter (WH2040): julia@womenshealth2040.org
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/julia-persson-digital-transformation/
- Location: Copenhagen, Denmark

## Speaker topics

- Perimenopause and menopause as a prevention window — the most underused prevention window in modern medicine.
- The Nordic Charter for Women's Health 2040: closing the 17-year research-to-care gap.
- AI in women's health: trust, bias, and what we're building for a generation.
- Building AI-native healthtech as a non-traditional founder.
- Women's health as economic opportunity: from payer to partner.

## Areas of expertise

Women's health, chronic disease prevention, AI-powered clinical decision support, precision health, digital health innovation, perimenopause and menopause, European Health Data Space, Nordic health policy, multi-stakeholder coordination, MDR medical device regulation.
